Localization.Description: An attempt to authenticate to an NPS

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is trying to authenticate to the NPS on host {event_src.host} using the RADIUS client with IP address {datafield5}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} sent a data accounting response to user {subject.account.fullname} using the RADIUS client with IP address {datafield5}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} granted access to a host to user {subject.account.name} who connected using the RADIUS client with IP address {datafield5}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} sent a request to a RADIUS client for additional information for user {subject.account.fullname}
User {subject.account.name} sent a data accounting request to the NPS on host {event_src.host} using the RADIUS client with IP address {datafield5}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} sent a request to a RADIUS client for additional information for user {subject.account.name}
User {subject.account.fullname} is trying to authenticate to the NPS on host {event_src.host} using the RADIUS client with IP address {datafield5}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} denied access to a host to user {subject.account.fullname} who connected using the RADIUS client with IP address {datafield5}
User {subject.account.fullname} sent a data accounting request to the NPS on host {event_src.host} using the RADIUS client with IP address {datafield5}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} sent a data accounting response to user {subject.account.name} using the RADIUS client with IP address {datafield5}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} denied access to a host to user {subject.account.name} who connected using the RADIUS client with IP address {datafield5}
The NPS on host {event_src.host} granted access to a host to user {subject.account.fullname} who connected using the RADIUS client with IP address {datafield5}
